user.title: QardioBase Scale Setup
user.description:
Select your QardioBase scale or enter its Bluetooth address manually. Found {found_devices} QardioBase device(s) via Bluetooth.

Tip: Step on the scale to wake it up before scanning.

users.title: Configure Users
users.description:
Add users who will use this scale. Set weight ranges so the scale can auto-detect who is weighing in.

Currently configured: {current_users} ({user_count} user(s))

error.no_address: Please select or enter a Bluetooth address
error.no_users: Please add at least one user
